items.prompt: In SV TB OOP literacy, transaction data usually lives in…
items.explain: Objects hold data you construct with new and pass by handle; components form hierarchy.

choices: UartPacket inherits Packet fields/methods and adds UART-specific members
Packet is deleted when UartPacket is created
Both classes must share the same parent component
extends only works in modules, not classes
items.explain: extends shares members; children specialize with extra fields or overridden virtual methods.

items.prompt: Driver and Monitor under CompBase are best described as…
choices: Sibling components with different roles in the hierarchy
Two names for the same object handle
items.explain: Components are hierarchy nodes—peers under a base with distinct run/build roles.

items.prompt: The browser class-sketch lab is diagram literacy—not a full SystemVerilog class runtime.
items.explain: It teaches trees and extends; real simulators execute new, phases, and polymorphism.
